rulings.Case Title: DONALD RYAN VS. LINDA JENKINSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defts' Motion To Require Pltf To Furnish Security (Ccp 391.1); This Case Is Stayed Pursuant To Ccp 391.6; Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Defts' Motion To Require Pltf To Furnish Security

DEFENDANT LINDA JENKINSON, LES CONCIERGES INC., RHONDA MEYER, RAMESH PATEL, JOSEPH RUKUS, MIKE TRENARY, KAREN VAN PARIS AND TRISH WONG'S Defendants' Motion To Require Plaintiff To Furnish Security (C.C.P. rulings.Case Title: JOONSOO KIM VS. HANMI BANK, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION,
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH O9, 2007, LINE 8. CROSS-DEFENDANT JOONSOO KIM, KIM & ASSOCIATES AND UNKNOWN BUSINESS ENTITY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION; CROSS-COMPLAINANT MUST ALLEGE WITH GREATER SPECIFICITY WHEN THE PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE OCCURRED. LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED WITHIN TEN DAYS. OVERRULED AS TO OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK GAUGHAN et al VS. KARL SHIBAYAMA et al

rulings.Case Title: MANUEL MUNOZ-ALFARO VS. D.N. SECURITY SERVICES, LLC, et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MARCH O9, 2007, LINE 11. DEFENDANT D.N. SECURITY SERVICES, L.L.C. AND DAVID NAGLE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION; THERE IS A PRIVATE RIGHT OF ACTION PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE 218, WHICH IS TO BE READ IN CONJUNCTION WITH LABOR CODE SECTION 226.7. A MOTION TO STRIKE IS THE PROPER WAY TO CHALLENGE THE RELIEF SOUGHT. SUSTAIN AS TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. OVERRRULED AS TO THE NINTH CAUSE OF ACTION; GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S CAUSE OF ACTION FOR RETALIATION PHILLIPS V GEMINI MOVING SPECIALISTS ALLOWS THE CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/PJM/PB)
